title: Toward Whole Cake Island
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on toward whole cake island within the The Road to Whole Cake Island storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaaa AAAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Revolo- Tionary Army got beaten?!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: If I remember correctly... aren't you the revolutionary dragon's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah! SABO! That's my brother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The one you said you met up with on Dressrossa?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've got another brother?! And he's the revoll- tipnary army chief of staff?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That means he's their second strongest member!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why is it that all of your siblings are crazy, dangerous people?!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Wait a sec ...does that mean that this person, here, next to him, dragon, is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh? Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your Grandpa said so two years ago, didn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Your father's name is...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Monkey D. Dragon. A Revolu- Tionary.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Dragon, the Commander- in-Chief of the Revolutionary Army...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Is your father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This guy's my dad ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How are you just realizing this now?!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Whaaaa?! Luffy, your dad is the boss of the revolutionary army?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'd have thought you'd be more curious about who he is! He's beyond famous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh... first time I'm actually seeing him. Doesn't look a thing like me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Robin even stayed with him for quite a long time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Anyway, I'm worried about SABO!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Well, a picture doesn't do his presence justice, Yohoho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oi! Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Based on Intel from an unidentified individual,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffy! Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: They were able to locate the revolutionary army head- quarters!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: except by the time the Marines and either pol arrived,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Blackbeard Pirates had already destroyed the place, apparently.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Black- Beard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: »Those guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why would black- beard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Go after the revolution- any army?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: On Dressrossa, Sabo and that champion guy fought...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Maybe that has something to do with it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It seems the yonkou blackbeard fled after briefly clashing with Cipher Pol.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: However, there isn't much infor- nation regarding those killed or wounded.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oi-

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: If perchance your father or brother were captured or even killed,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: that would be huge news. I'm certain they wouldn't leave it out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I guess we can tentatively say that they are safe, for the time being at least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OH YEAH! YOU'RE RIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi! Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What is it?! sheesh.

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: I'm fine with you making food for us, but is the kitchen supposed to look like that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fire?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aah! I forgot to turn off the stove!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GyaAAH! It ex- ploded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Put out the fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A storm's coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He-H?!

summary: Toward Whole Cake Island: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
